roadmap.target_role: Senior Full Stack Engineer (System Design Specialist)

vision_profile.current_state: A Senior Full Stack Engineer with 5+ years of experience in cloud architecture and microservices, proficient in a wide range of modern technologies.
vision_profile.main_blocker: Needs to deepen expertise in system design, specifically in choosing the right architecture, to excel further and secure promotions.
vision_profile.top_motivation: To achieve promotion to a higher engineering role and significantly improve architectural decision-making in current and future projects.

milestones.label: M01
milestones.o: You understand core system design principles, non-functional requirements, and can articulate trade-offs for basic architectural choices.
milestones.identity_statement: You are laying the groundwork for becoming a master architect, building a robust understanding of how systems are truly built.

scenario.title: Analyzing Requirements for a New Feature
Choosing NFRs for an E-commerce Platform
Deciding on Consistency Models

science.desc: You are tasked with designing a new feature for an existing application. Analyze the functional and non-functional requirements and propose an initial architectural direction, justifying your trade-offs.

video.title: Deep Dive into TCP/IP and HTTP

scenario.title: Troubleshooting Network Latency

video.title: Implementing Load Balancers for High Availability

scenario.title: Designing a Global DNS Strategy

video.title: Choosing Between Message Queues and Event Streams

scenario.title: Implementing an API Gateway for Microservices

milestones.label: M02
milestones.o: You can design robust data storage solutions, define clear APIs, and understand their impact on overall system architecture.
milestones.identity_statement: You are mastering the fundamental building blocks of any scalable system, ensuring data integrity and efficient communication.

modules.title: Databases & Storage
lessons: NoSQL Database Types (Key-Value, Document, Columnar, Graph)

video.title: SQL vs. NoSQL: When to Use Which

scenario.title: Designing a Database for a Social Media App
Optimizing Queries with Proper Indexing
Scaling a Database for Millions of Users

science.desc: Design the data storage layer for a new real-time analytics platform. Consider data volume, velocity, variety, and choose appropriate database types and scaling strategies.

scenario.title: Designing a Resource-Oriented API for a Blog

video.title: When to Choose GraphQL Over REST

scenario.title: Migrating a REST API to GraphQL
Handling API Versioning for Backward Compatibility

milestones.label: M03
milestones.o: You can design and implement distributed systems, breaking down monolithic applications into scalable microservices.
milestones.identity_statement: You are evolving into an architect capable of orchestrating complex, independent services into a cohesive, high-performing system.

scenario.title: Designing for Data Consistency Across Regions

video.title: Implementing Raft for Distributed State Management

scenario.title: Handling Distributed Transactions with Saga Pattern

video.title: Designing Systems with Kafka and Event Streams

scenario.title: Building an Event-Sourced Order Processing System

science.desc: You need to design a distributed payment processing system that ensures atomicity and consistency across multiple services. Propose an architecture and explain how you'd handle failures.

modules.title: Microservices Architecture
lessons: Data Management in Microservices (Database per Service)

scenario.title: Identifying Service Boundaries using DDD
Scaling a Microservice with Kubernetes HPA
Choosing Between Kubernetes and Serverless for a New Service

milestones.label: M04
milestones.o: You can identify performance bottlenecks, implement caching strategies, and design highly scalable and responsive systems.
milestones.identity_statement: You are becoming the engineer who can make systems perform under extreme load, ensuring a seamless user experience.

scenario.title: Scaling a High-Traffic E-commerce Checkout Service
Invalidating Cache for Real-time Data
Optimizing a Slow Database Query in Production

science.desc: A critical service is experiencing high latency under peak load. Analyze the potential causes, propose a scaling strategy, and outline how you would implement caching to alleviate the issue.

milestones.label: M05
milestones.o: You can design systems that are resilient to failures, secure against threats, and fully observable for proactive issue resolution.
milestones.identity_statement: You are the guardian of system integrity, building trust through robust security and ensuring continuous operation.

scenario.title: Identifying Security Vulnerabilities in a Microservice
Securing a Multi-Tier Application with VPCs and Firewalls
Reviewing Code for Common Security Flaws

science.desc: A new payment gateway integration requires strict security. Design the authentication, authorization, and data encryption mechanisms, considering potential attack vectors.

video.title: Designing a Multi-Region Disaster Recovery Plan

scenario.title: Implementing Active-Passive vs. Active-Active DR

video.title: Applying Circuit Breaker and Bulkhead Patterns

scenario.title: Designing for Graceful Degradation in Microservices
Setting up Proactive Monitoring and Alerting for Critical Services

milestones.label: M06
milestones.o: You can evaluate and apply complex architectural patterns, understand their trade-offs, and design systems for specific industry needs, including AI integration.
milestones.identity_statement: You are now a strategic thinker, capable of selecting and adapting sophisticated architectural patterns to solve novel and challenging problems.

video.title: Deep Dive into URL Shortener Architecture

scenario.title: Optimizing a URL Shortener for High Throughput
Handling Message Delivery Guarantees in a Chat System
Designing for Fan-out on Write vs. Fan-out on Read

science.desc: Design a system for a global online gaming platform that needs to handle millions of concurrent users, low latency, and high availability for game state synchronization and leaderboards.

scenario.title: Designing a System for Online Fraud Detection with ML
Automating Model Retraining and Deployment

video.title: Monitoring AI Model Drift and Performance

scenario.title: Addressing Bias in an AI-Powered Hiring System

milestones.label: M07
milestones.o: You are proficient in leading complex system design initiatives, making strategic architectural decisions, and excelling in high-level system design interviews.
milestones.identity_statement: You are now a recognized architectural leader, capable of shaping the technical direction of products and mentoring future generations of engineers.

video.title: Designing a Large-Scale Distributed System from Scratch

scenario.title: Leading an Architectural Review for a New Product
Presenting a Complex System Design to Stakeholders
Mock Interview: Design a Global Video Streaming Service

science.desc: You are asked to design a highly available and scalable online gaming platform. Walk through the design process, considering all aspects from data storage to real-time communication and fault tolerance.
